============================================================
llms-full.txt - DevUI Pencil Design System
============================================================

# 1. METADATA | 元数据
PROJECT_NAME: DevUI Design System
SOURCE_FORMAT: Pencil .pen (version 2.x)
SYNC_TARGET: Angular / Vue / React (DevUI Component Library)
LAYOUT_ENGINE: Pencil Auto Layout (Flex-compatible)
DESIGN_PHILOSOPHY: 沉浸 (Immersive) · 灵活 (Flexible) · 至简 (Simplistic)
REFERENCE: https://devui.design/design-cn/start

# 2. GLOBAL DESIGN TOKENS (Extracted from .pen) | 全局设计令牌

## 2.1 Colors | 颜色

### Brand / 品牌色
- devui-brand: #5E7CE0
- devui-brand-hover: #7693F5
- devui-brand-active: #344899
- devui-brand-active-alt: #526ECC
- devui-brand-disabled: #BECCFA
- devui-brand-light: #F2F5FC
- devui-brand-light-alt: #F5F9FF
- devui-brand-overlay: #5E7CE033

### Functional / 功能色
- devui-success: #50D4AB
- devui-warning: #FA9841
- devui-danger: #F66F6A
- devui-danger-dark: #C00F0C
- devui-info: #5E7CE0

### Text / 文字色
- devui-text-primary: #252B3A
- devui-text-secondary: #575D6C
- devui-text-tertiary: #71757F
- devui-text-placeholder: #ADB0B8
- devui-text-disabled: #BABBC0
- devui-text-link: #5E7CE0
- devui-text-link-active: #526ECC
- devui-text-inverse: #FFFFFF
- devui-text-dark: #191919 / #181818
- devui-text-annotation: #9747FF (design annotation only)

### Background / 背景色
- devui-bg-base: #FFFFFF
- devui-bg-light: #F5F5F5
- devui-bg-lighter: #F5F5F6
- devui-bg-page: #FBFBFC
- devui-bg-brand-light: #F2F5FC
- devui-bg-success-light: #EDFFF9
- devui-bg-warning-light: #FCF0C2
- devui-bg-danger-light: #FFEEED

### Border / 边框色
- devui-border-default: #DFE1E6
- devui-border-secondary: #ADB0B8
- devui-border-subtle: #D7D8DA / #D5D5DB
- devui-border-hover: #575D6C
- devui-border-active: #5E7CE0
- devui-border-disabled: #DFE1E6
- devui-border-frame: #0000001A

### Status Tag Colors / 状态标签色
- tag-indigo: #6B1091 / bg #F4E0FC
- tag-purple: #543BBA / bg #B27EF5
- tag-pink: #B50E65 / bg #FFD6E8
- tag-red: #DA5F5F / bg #F9B3BC
- tag-orange: #E78359 / bg #F4B089
- tag-yellow: #A67711 / bg #EAD883
- tag-green: #62B42E / bg #AEEA83
- tag-green-alt: #006624 / bg #D5F2DC
- tag-teal: #28858B / bg #87D6DC
- tag-cyan: #1075A3 / bg #D6F6FF
- tag-blue: #0950DE / bg #CEDEFD
- tag-blue-alt: #6CA3F4 / bg #A5E6FA

## 2.2 Typography | 排版

### Font Families
- primary-cn: "Noto Sans SC"
- secondary-cn: "HarmonyOS Sans SC"
- latin: "Roboto"

### Font Sizes
| Token | Size | Usage |
|-------|------|-------|
| text-xs | 12px | 辅助说明、标签、徽章 |
| text-sm | 14px | 正文、表格内容、按钮文字（默认） |
| text-base | 15px | 导航项文字 |
| text-md | 16px | 小标题、注释文字 |
| text-lg | 18px | 卡片标题 |
| text-xl | 22px | 二级标题 |
| text-2xl | 24px | 一级标题 |
| text-4xl | 48px | 超大展示文字 |

### Font Weights
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| weight-regular | 400 (normal) | 正文、表格内容 |
| weight-medium | 500 | 强调文字、导航选中 |
| weight-bold | 700 | 标题、按钮文字 |

## 2.3 Spacing | 间距

### Grid System
- Base Unit: 4px
- Scale: 0, 1, 2, 4, 5, 8, 10, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32

### Common Padding Patterns (vertical, horizontal)
| Pattern | Usage |
|---------|-------|
| [4, 8] | Icon button (md) |
| [4, 12] | Button (sm), Select option |
| [5, 16] | Button (md) |
| [9, 20] | Button (lg) |
| [0, 16] | Table cell content |
| [8, 8] | Generic container |
| [11, 16] | Table header cell |
| [12, 12] | Card inner padding |
| [20, 20] | Card outer padding |

## 2.4 Corner Radius | 圆角

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| radius-none | 0 | 无圆角 |
| radius-xs | 1px | 微圆角 |
| radius-sm | 2px | 外框容器 |
| radius-default | 4px | 按钮、输入框、选择框、标签 |
| radius-md | 5px / 6px | 设计标注边框 |
| radius-lg | 8px | 卡片、表头首尾 |
| radius-xl | 16px | 大圆角容器 |
| radius-pill | 100px / 999px | 药丸形标签、Badge |

## 2.5 Stroke | 描边

### Thickness
- Default: 1px
- Direction variants: bottom-only (表格行分隔线)

### Stroke Colors
- Frame border: #0000001A (10% black)
- Default border: #DFE1E6
- Secondary border: #ADB0B8
- Hover border: #575D6C
- Active/Focus border: #5E7CE0
- Success border: #50D4AB
- Warning border: #FA9841
- Error border: #F66F6A
- Disabled border: #DFE1E6
- Design annotation: #9747FF

============================================================

# 3. COMPONENT SPECIFICATIONS | 组件规范

============================================================

---
COMPONENT: 按钮-主要 (Primary Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 按钮 Button (FfKhm)
NODE_NAME: 按钮-主要 (3P40h)
REUSABLE_VARIANTS:
  - "尺寸-Size=lg, 状态-Status=default" (K9tFF)
  - "尺寸-Size=lg, 状态-Status=hover" (jIfbE)
  - "尺寸-Size=lg, 状态-Status=active" (YhXZ6)
  - "尺寸-Size=lg, 状态-Status=disabled" (nygEd)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=default" (RoYUx)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=hover" (pByHw)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=active" (KIMIP)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=disabled" (RxlWM)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=default" (VoApM)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=hover" (nO5N9)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=active" (zAVRj)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=disabled" (cdeMS)
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "horizontal (flex)",
  "gap": 4,
  "justifyContent": "center",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "cornerRadius": 4,
  "stroke": { "align": "inside", "thickness": 1 }
}
SIZE_MAPPING: {
  "lg": { "padding": [9, 20], "height": "~38px" },
  "md": { "padding": [5, 16], "height": "~30px" },
  "sm": { "padding": [4, 12], "height": "~26px" }
}
STATE_MAPPING: {
  "default": { "fill": "#5E7CE0", "textColor": "#FFFFFF" },
  "hover": { "fill": "#7693F5", "textColor": "#FFFFFF" },
  "active": { "fill": "#344899", "textColor": "#FFFFFF" },
  "disabled": { "fill": "#BECCFA", "textColor": "#FFFFFF" }
}
CHILDREN: [text label, optional icon]
---

---
COMPONENT: 按钮-次要 (Secondary Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 按钮 Button (FfKhm)
NODE_NAME: 按钮-次要 (VjlZh)
REUSABLE_VARIANTS:
  - "尺寸-Size=lg, 状态-Status=default" (UQ59s)
  - "尺寸-Size=lg, 状态-Status=hover" (Cdv16)
  - "尺寸-Size=lg, 状态-Status=active" (Q4EbF)
  - "尺寸-Size=lg, 状态-Status=disabled" (93juY)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=default" (qTc8e)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=hover" (17y4y)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=active" (gEwWY)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=disabled" (CCkpg)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=default" (9auaH)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=hover" (jdFli)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=active" (ue0Vb)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=disabled" (TsTbZ)
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "horizontal (flex)",
  "gap": 4,
  "alignItems": "center",
  "cornerRadius": 4,
  "fill": "#FFFFFF"
}
SIZE_MAPPING: {
  "lg": { "padding": [9, 20] },
  "md": { "padding": [4, 16] },
  "sm": { "padding": [4, 12] }
}
STATE_MAPPING: {
  "default": { "fill": "#FFFFFF", "stroke": "#ADB0B8", "textColor": "#252B3A" },
  "hover": { "fill": "#FFFFFF", "stroke": "#575D6C", "textColor": "#252B3A" },
  "active": { "fill": "#FFFFFF", "stroke": "#5E7CE0", "textColor": "#5E7CE0" },
  "disabled": { "fill": "#F5F5F5", "stroke": "#DFE1E6", "textColor": "#BABBC0" }
}
CHILDREN: [text label]
---

---
COMPONENT: 按钮-图标文本按钮 (Icon Text Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 按钮 Button (FfKhm)
NODE_NAME: 按钮-图标文本按钮 (KBfnv)
REUSABLE_VARIANTS:
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=default" (hOrvp)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=hover" (fIrpe)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=active" (HDzvI)
  - "尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=disabled" (f1YLW)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=default" (pQrIo)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=hover" (owqOH)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=active" (VsKee)
  - "尺寸-Size=sm, 状态-Status=disabled" (tMdve)
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "horizontal (flex)",
  "gap": 4,
  "padding": [4, 8],
  "justifyContent": "center",
  "alignItems": "center"
}
CHILDREN: [icon, text label]
---

---
COMPONENT: 按钮-可下拉次要组合按钮 (Dropdown Combo Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 按钮 Button (FfKhm)
NODE_NAME: 按钮-可下拉次要组合按钮 (pgJCk)
VARIANT_KEYS: 状态-status × icon or number × 尺寸
REUSABLE_VARIANTS (24):
  - status: default / right-hover / right-active / left-hover / left-active / disabled
  - icon or number: icon / number
  - 尺寸: md / sm
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "horizontal (flex)",
  "alignItems": "center"
}
CHILDREN: [left-button, divider, right-button(icon/number)]
---

---
COMPONENT: 页签 Pills (Tab Pills)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 页签 Tabs (DUS2U)
NODE_NAME: 页签 Pills (hUpTN)
REUSABLE_VARIANTS:
  - "选项状态-status=default" (cjfjz)
  - "选项状态-status=hover" (kCVTK)
  - "选项状态-status=disabled" (gZeuy)
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "horizontal (flex)",
  "gap": 10,
  "justifyContent": "center",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "fill": { "color": "#FFFFFF", "enabled": false }
}
CHILDREN: [tab label text]
---

---
COMPONENT: 页签 Wrapped (Tab Wrapped)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 页签 Tabs (DUS2U)
NODE_NAMES: 页签 Wrapped (xRc0N), 页签 Wrapped (h27vY)
SUB_COMPONENTS: 页签Tabs (WCYrh), 页签Pills (7TFQJ)
ADDITIONAL: .页签 Icon-主组件 (5PYjd), .页签-图标-主组件 (1SgIw), 页签 Icon (vwbpj), 页签-图标页签 (hiWKM)
---

---
COMPONENT: 面包屑 BreadCrumbs
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 面包屑 BreadCrumbs (BNX1S)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - .分隔符 (kU8Hw): 面包屑分隔符
  - .基础面包屑组件 (nt1sQ): 单个面包屑项
  - 面包屑组 (WWjsX): 面包屑列表
  - 面包屑 (0HCYy): reusable=true，完整面包屑组件
---

---
COMPONENT: 分页器 Pagination
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 分页器 Pagination (ag313)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - .页码 (cfNVT): 页码单项
  - 分页 Pagination (5ut0A): 完整分页组件
---

---
COMPONENT: 输入框 TextInput
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 输入框 TextInput (UaxE1)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - 文本输入框 (AmMmC): 标准文本输入
  - 数字输入框 (2cZ0L): 数字输入（带加减按钮）
  - 表单标题 (D8xKk): 表单项标签
  - 表单项-文本输入框 (nV17n): 完整表单项（标签 + 输入框）
---

---
COMPONENT: 选择框 Select
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 选择框 Select (sfJNO)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - 下拉选择框 (X14Fz): 单选下拉
  - 下拉选项 (hkIMR): 选项列表项
  - 基础选择面板 (XuL3k): reusable=true，选择面板
  - 下拉选择框-多选 (hkhAU): 多选下拉
  - 内容下展 (1KR3u): 下拉展开面板
  - 表单项-下拉选择框 (pQBL1): 完整表单项（标签 + 下拉）
---

---
COMPONENT: 复选框 Checkbox
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 复选框 Checkbox (2b27B)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - 复选框 (Atjkh): 复选框基础组件
  - 复选框文本组合 (qPs4a): 复选框 + 标签文本
---

---

PARENT_FRAME: 搜索框 Search (UWJE6)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - 搜索框-线框白底风格 (3rxWU): 线框白底搜索输入框

PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 标签 Tag (WnKo0)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - 标签 (cqGDU): 基础标签
  - 辅助标签 (adEVi): 辅助信息标签
  - 常规标签 (mWFIK): 常规颜色标签
  - 线性标签 (Oiovv): 线性/描边标签

---
COMPONENT: 表格 DataTable
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 表格 DataTable (7l0Mm)
SUB_COMPONENTS:

  ### 默认类/表头单项 (lTZlV)
  REUSABLE_VARIANTS:
    - "灰色背景-header-bg=false, 位置-position=startPosition, 内容类型-contentType=textContent" (wESXH)
    - "灰色背景-header-bg=true, 位置-position=startPosition, 内容类型-contentType=textContent" (mhpVI)
    - "灰色背景-header-bg=true, 位置-position=middleItem, 内容类型-contentType=textContent" (WBomk)
    - "灰色背景-header-bg=false, 位置-position=middleItem, 内容类型-contentType=textContent" (LpA5I)
    - "灰色背景-header-bg=false, 位置-position=endPosition, 内容类型-contentType=textContent" (AB0Fa)
    - "灰色背景-header-bg=true, 位置-position=endPosition, 内容类型-contentType=textContent" (P3Xaq)
    - "灰色背景-header-bg=false, 位置-position=startPosition, 内容类型-contentType=checkBox" (zRdrw)
    - "灰色背景-header-bg=true, 位置-position=startPosition, 内容类型-contentType=checkBox" (55ztu)
  PROPERTIES: {
    "width": 200,
    "height": 42,
    "gap": 35.5,
    "padding": [11, 16],
    "alignItems": "center",
    "stroke": { "thickness": { "bottom": 1 }, "fill": "#DFE1E6" }
  }
  HEADER_BG_MAPPING: {
    "false": { "fill": "#FFFFFF" },
    "true": { "fill": "#F5F5F5" }
  }
  CORNER_RADIUS_POSITION: {
    "startPosition + header-bg=true": [8, 0, 0, 8],
    "endPosition + header-bg=true": [0, 8, 8, 0]
  }

  ### 默认类/表体单项 (zUkyF)
  REUSABLE_VARIANTS:
    - "内容类型-contentType=text, 状态-Status=default" (04RWb)
    - "内容类型-contentType=text, 状态-Status=hover" (6yvdM)
    - "内容类型-contentType=treeStructure, 状态-Status=default" (cnNMk)
    - "内容类型-contentType=link, 状态-Status=default" (wwSOt)
    - "内容类型-contentType=statusWithName, 状态-Status=default" (j1Bof)
    - "内容类型-contentType=iconWithLabelAndTitle, 状态-Status=default" (8x4LU)
    - "内容类型-contentType=textWithLabel, 状态-Status=default" (kc5L0)
    - "内容类型-contentType=tags, 状态-Status=default" (jVg7o)
    - "内容类型-contentType=labelWithText, 状态-Status=default" (5WGLz)
    - "内容类型-contentType=priorityLevel, 状态-Status=default" (o1smi)
    - "内容类型-contentType=perationColumn, 状态-Status=default" (7KWv3)
  PROPERTIES: {
    "width": 200,
    "height": 42,
    "gap": 8,
    "padding": [0, 16],
    "alignItems": "center",
    "fill": "#FFFFFF",
    "stroke": { "thickness": { "bottom": 1 }, "fill": "#DFE1E6" }
  }

  ### .priority-flag (lfOjr)
  REUSABLE_VARIANTS:
    - "优先级=低" (QFgfR): 16×16
    - "优先级=中" (1RjoZ): 16×16
    - "优先级=高" (4031i): 16×16

  ### .操作列 (wcBqp)
  REUSABLE_VARIANTS:
    - "数量-number=1" (RDeTa)
    - "数量-number=2" (ED8JJ)
    - "数量-number=3" (IcutX)

  ### 合并单元格/表头单项 (Kbwuq)
  ### 合并单元格/表体单项 (7s2J4)
  ### .表体组件/树结构 (5oY81)
  ### .表体组件/状态图标 (NFMqP)
  ### .表体组件/文本 (mpSRD)
  ### 表格 (Xa8D1): 完整表格组合
---

---
COMPONENT: 卡片 Card
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 卡片 (cFUjw)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - .有图标标题 (8f7wl): 带图标的卡片标题
  - .无图标标题 (38oQL): 不带图标的卡片标题
  - .标题 (wOhsE): 通用标题
  - .信息展示 (wyZiP): 信息展示区域
  - 计数徽章 (B4HGI): 数字徽章
  - 项目卡片 (aNeB6): 项目信息卡片
  - 基本卡片 (MNQqe): 基本卡片
  - 基本卡片 (YCOKr): reusable=true，可复用基本卡片
  - 基本卡片 (WLYWO): reusable=true，可复用基本卡片变体
  - 带图卡片 (D7aOz): 带图片的卡片
  - .操作图标 (B0tUj): 卡片操作图标
---

---
COMPONENT: 业务组件（更多卡片）
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 业务组件（更多卡片）(D0C5W)
REUSABLE_SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - 左侧选择菜单卡片 (6aBNN): reusable=true
  - banner卡片 (wxO2j): reusable=true
  - banner (lSc0M): reusable=true
  - 公告卡片 (3kAYs): reusable=true
  - 活动卡片 (ioZGG): reusable=true
  - api-arts 1 (bN6s9): reusable=true
NON_REUSABLE:
  - 卡片icon (d8fXQ)
  - .左侧选择卡片选项 (7QD5G)
  - 字母icon (svERR)
  - 帮助文档卡片 (jPTnc)
---

COMPONENT: 筛选 Filter
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 筛选 Filter (UsEWV)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - .筛选-选项-单项 (vvQ7M): 筛选选项单项
  - 筛选选择面板 (kS640): 筛选面板
  - 筛选 (CLurw): 完整筛选组件
---

---
COMPONENT: 表单 Form
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
PARENT_FRAME: 表单 form (Qyuse)
SUB_COMPONENTS:
  - 表单组件 (UIc9P): 完整表单组件

---

============================================================

# 4. TRANSFORMATION RULES | 转换规则

============================================================

## 4.1 Layout Rules | 布局规则
1. 所有带 `layout: "horizontal"` 的 Frame 映射为 `display: flex; flex-direction: row`
2. 所有带 `layout: "vertical"` 的 Frame 映射为 `display: flex; flex-direction: column`
3. `layout: "none"` 的 Frame 使用绝对定位 (`position: absolute`)
4. `gap` 值直接映射为 CSS `gap` 属性
5. `padding: [v, h]` 映射为 `padding: {v}px {h}px`
6. `padding: [top, right, bottom, left]` 映射为对应 CSS padding
7. `justifyContent: "center"` → `justify-content: center`
8. `alignItems: "center"` → `align-items: center`

## 4.2 Visual Property Rules | 视觉属性规则
1. `cornerRadius: N` → `border-radius: Npx`
2. `cornerRadius: [TL, TR, BR, BL]` → `border-radius: TLpx TRpx BRpx BLpx`
3. `fill: "#hex"` → `background-color: #hex`
4. `fill: { "color": "#hex", "enabled": false }` → 背景色不可见（隐藏状态）
5. `stroke.thickness: 1` → `border: 1px solid {stroke.fill}`
6. `stroke.thickness: { "bottom": 1 }` → `border-bottom: 1px solid {stroke.fill}`
7. `stroke.align: "inside"` → 使用 `box-sizing: border-box`

## 4.3 Component Translation Rules | 组件转换规则
1. `reusable: true` 的 Frame → 目标框架的独立组件
2. 变体命名格式 `Key=Value` → 组件 Props (如 `尺寸-Size=lg` → `size="lg"`)
3. `enabled: false` 的子节点 → 可选 Slot 或条件渲染
4. 组合按钮的 left/right 状态 → 独立的 hover/active 事件处理
5. 表格行的 bottom-only stroke → `border-bottom` 样式

## 4.4 Color Token Mapping | 颜色令牌映射
| Hex Value | Token Name | Usage |
|-----------|------------|-------|
| #5E7CE0 | --devui-brand | 主色、链接色、激活边框 |
| #7693F5 | --devui-brand-hover | 悬停主色 |
| #344899 | --devui-brand-active | 按下主色 |
| #526ECC | --devui-brand-active-focus | 聚焦主色 |
| #BECCFA | --devui-brand-disabled | 禁用主色 |
| #252B3A | --devui-text | 主文字色 |
| #575D6C | --devui-text-weak | 辅助文字色 |
| #ADB0B8 | --devui-placeholder | 占位符色 |
| #BABBC0 | --devui-disabled-text | 禁用文字色 |
| #FFFFFF | --devui-base-bg | 基础白色背景 |
| #F5F5F5 | --devui-area-bg | 区域灰色背景 |
| #F2F5FC | --devui-global-bg | 全局品牌浅色背景 |
| #DFE1E6 | --devui-dividing-line | 分隔线/默认边框 |
| #50D4AB | --devui-success | 成功色 |
| #FA9841 | --devui-warning | 警告色 |
| #F66F6A | --devui-danger | 危险色 |

============================================================

# 5. FORBIDDEN PATTERNS | 禁用模式

============================================================

1. 禁止对 Auto Layout Frame 使用绝对定位 (x/y)，除非 `layout: "none"`
2. 禁止硬编码色值，必须使用 Token 变量名
3. 禁止直接引用 Node ID 作为选择器，使用语义化的类名
4. 禁止忽略 `enabled: false` 的节点，它们表示组件的可配置项
5. 禁止在表格中使用全边框，DevUI 表格仅使用 bottom border
6. 禁止将设计标注色 (#9747FF) 用于生产代码

============================================================

# 6. VARIANT MAPPING REFERENCE | 变体映射参考

============================================================

## Button 按钮
| Design Variant Key | Code Prop | Values |
|--------------------|-----------|--------|
| 尺寸-Size | size | "lg" / "md" / "sm" |
| 状态-Status | state (CSS pseudo) | "default" / "hover" / "active" / "disabled" |
| 类型 | variant | "primary" / "secondary" / "icon-text" / "dropdown-combo" |
| icon or number | dropdownType | "icon" / "number" |

## Tabs 页签
| Design Variant Key | Code Prop | Values |
|--------------------|-----------|--------|
| 选项状态-status | state (CSS pseudo) | "default" / "hover" / "active" / "disabled" |
| 类型 | type | "pills" / "wrapped" / "icon" |

## DataTable 表格
| Design Variant Key | Code Prop | Values |
|--------------------|-----------|--------|
| 灰色背景-header-bg | headerBg | true / false |
| 位置-position | position | "start" / "middle" / "end" |
| 内容类型-contentType | contentType | "text" / "checkBox" / "link" / "tags" / "treeStructure" / "statusWithName" / "iconWithLabelAndTitle" / "textWithLabel" / "labelWithText" / "priorityLevel" / "operationColumn" |
| 状态-Status | state (CSS pseudo) | "default" / "hover" |
| 优先级 | priority | "low" / "medium" / "high" |
| 数量-number | count | 1 / 2 / 3 |

============================================================

# END OF DOCUMENT
============================================================
